name: Ty5_LTR_family
description: Ty5 retrotransposon family in S. cerevisiae. 5.4 kb element with 251 bp 'omega' LTRs. S288C carries 0-1 full-length Ty5 plus ~6 solo omega LTRs, mostly at subtelomeric silent chromatin. Ty5 integrates preferentially into Sir-mediated heterochromatin (telomeres, HM cassettes).

architecture.internal_structure: 5'LTR (251 bp) - gag-pol ORFs - 3'LTR; solo LTRs are recombination products of intra-element exchange

expected_copy_count: ~1 full-length elements + ~6 solo LTRs per haploid S288C genome; strain-variable
